title: The Essential Services Maintenance (Assam) Act, 1980
full_text: The Essential Services Maintenance (Assam) Act, 1980 आवश्‍यक सेवा (असम) अधिनियम, 1980 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198041 Act Number: 41 Enactment Date: 1980-07-19 Act Year: 1980 Short Title: The Essential Services Maintenance (Assam) Act, 1980 Hindi Title: आवश्‍यक सेवा (असम) अधिनियम, 1980 Long Title: An Act to provide for the maintenance of certain essential services and the normal life of the community in Assam. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 19-07-1980 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Essential Services Maintenance (Assam) Act, 1980 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to prohibit strikes in certain employments. Section 4. Dismissal of employees participating in illegal strikes. Section 5. Penalty for illegal strikes. Section 6. Penalty for instigation, etc. Section 7. Penalty for giving financial aid to illegal strikes. Section 8. Power to arrest without warrant. Section 9. Offences to be tried summarily. Section 10. Act to override other laws. Section 11. Repeal and saving.
